<> to replace one url with another within a string in php you can use the str_replace function which is straightforward and effective for this task here is an example of how to do it ```php $string = 'new post on the site http://stackoverflow.com/xyz1

'; $oldUrl = 'http://stackoverflow.com/xyz1'; $newUrl = 'http://yahoo.com/abc1'; $replacedString = str_replace($oldUrl, $newUrl, $string); echo $replacedString; ``` this will replace all occurrences of the old url with the new one in the given string a palindrome is a word or phrase that reads the same backward as forward such as "madam" or "racecar" the string "level" is also a palindrome
